## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss updates and strategy for investor pitch materials, focusing on key metrics and presentation approach.](https://fathom.video/share/yY89pzA3YY1ufqxnz4xJTBkVvz-oJKf-?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Adding Q4 2024 projections to financial tables for completeness](https://fathom.video/share/yY89pzA3YY1ufqxnz4xJTBkVvz-oJKf-?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [Emphasizing sales efficiency, pipeline strength, and recent upsells to demonstrate growth](https://fathom.video/share/yY89pzA3YY1ufqxnz4xJTBkVvz-oJKf-?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)
  - [Including a sales call recording to showcase CEO's sales prowess and product appeal](https://fathom.video/share/yY89pzA3YY1ufqxnz4xJTBkVvz-oJKf-?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)
  - [Prioritizing a concise, high-level pitch doc for broader distribution, with detailed data room info to follow](https://fathom.video/share/yY89pzA3YY1ufqxnz4xJTBkVvz-oJKf-?tab=summary&timestamp=1129.0)

## Topics

### Investor Relations Update

  - [Marcel had a positive call with Ryan from Iconic Ventures](https://fathom.video/share/yY89pzA3YY1ufqxnz4xJTBkVvz-oJKf-?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)
      - [Ryan expressed strong interest, having followed up consistently since missing Series A](https://fathom.video/share/yY89pzA3YY1ufqxnz4xJTBkVvz-oJKf-?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)
      - [Iconic, Radical, and Sapphire are top choices due to multiple meetings and good rapport](https://fathom.video/share/yY89pzA3YY1ufqxnz4xJTBkVvz-oJKf-?tab=summary&timestamp=1119.0)
  - [Plan to send initial pitch materials to trusted contacts (Radical, Sapphire, Iconic)](https://fathom.video/share/yY89pzA3YY1ufqxnz4xJTBkVvz-oJKf-?tab=summary&timestamp=1136.0)
  - [Use TLDR + slide for scheduling meetings with other potential investors](https://fathom.video/share/yY89pzA3YY1ufqxnz4xJTBkVvz-oJKf-?tab=summary&timestamp=1136.0)

### Financial Metrics and Projections

  - [Current signed run rate: $10.47M](https://fathom.video/share/yY89pzA3YY1ufqxnz4xJTBkVvz-oJKf-?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)
  - [Projecting end of September at $11.5M (potential for 11 kickoffs in September)](https://fathom.video/share/yY89pzA3YY1ufqxnz4xJTBkVvz-oJKf-?tab=summary&timestamp=478.0)
  - [Adding Q4 2024 to financial tables, even if some numbers are estimates](https://fathom.video/share/yY89pzA3YY1ufqxnz4xJTBkVvz-oJKf-?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [Considering inclusion of Q3 2024 data, focusing on ARR and customer count](https://fathom.video/share/yY89pzA3YY1ufqxnz4xJTBkVvz-oJKf-?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)

### Sales and Pipeline Metrics

  - [Aim to showcase sales efficiency and strong pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/yY89pzA3YY1ufqxnz4xJTBkVvz-oJKf-?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)
  - [Include metrics on:](https://fathom.video/share/yY89pzA3YY1ufqxnz4xJTBkVvz-oJKf-?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
      - [Number of sales meetings in recent months](https://fathom.video/share/yY89pzA3YY1ufqxnz4xJTBkVvz-oJKf-?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
      - [Deal closure rate (expected to be high)](https://fathom.video/share/yY89pzA3YY1ufqxnz4xJTBkVvz-oJKf-?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
      - Sales cycle length (most deals close in \<30 days)
  - [Highlight logos in the pipeline and aggregate pipeline value](https://fathom.video/share/yY89pzA3YY1ufqxnz4xJTBkVvz-oJKf-?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
  - [Emphasize recent upsells (e.g., Surge, Augment Code, Airbyte)](https://fathom.video/share/yY89pzA3YY1ufqxnz4xJTBkVvz-oJKf-?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### Product Demonstration Strategy

  - [Plan to include a recent 45-minute sales call recording (Novan's second call)](https://fathom.video/share/yY89pzA3YY1ufqxnz4xJTBkVvz-oJKf-?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)
      - [Showcases CEO's sales skills and product appeal](https://fathom.video/share/yY89pzA3YY1ufqxnz4xJTBkVvz-oJKf-?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)
      - [Demonstrates handling of stakeholder objections and questions](https://fathom.video/share/yY89pzA3YY1ufqxnz4xJTBkVvz-oJKf-?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)
  - [Consider adding the 2-hour workshop recording as additional resource](https://fathom.video/share/yY89pzA3YY1ufqxnz4xJTBkVvz-oJKf-?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)

### Durability and Growth Indicators

  - [Focus on "durability bullets" to defend long-term viability](https://fathom.video/share/yY89pzA3YY1ufqxnz4xJTBkVvz-oJKf-?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Highlight Q3 expansion, active upsells, and logos](https://fathom.video/share/yY89pzA3YY1ufqxnz4xJTBkVvz-oJKf-?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Calculate and potentially include Net Revenue Retention (NRR) metrics](https://fathom.video/share/yY89pzA3YY1ufqxnz4xJTBkVvz-oJKf-?tab=summary&timestamp=1185.0)
      - [Consider showing last 90 days vs. last 6-12 months to demonstrate improvement](https://fathom.video/share/yY89pzA3YY1ufqxnz4xJTBkVvz-oJKf-?tab=summary&timestamp=1348.0)

### Miscellaneous KPIs

  - [21 people paying for ungated community access, indicating strong product value](https://fathom.video/share/yY89pzA3YY1ufqxnz4xJTBkVvz-oJKf-?tab=summary&timestamp=1535.0)
  - [Consider including expert efficiency and engagement metrics if relevant](https://fathom.video/share/yY89pzA3YY1ufqxnz4xJTBkVvz-oJKf-?tab=summary&timestamp=1526.0)
